subject: Use Silicon SR2 version of parent poms
commit_message:
Use Silicon SR2 version of parent poms

Update to use Istanbul / Silicon SR2 version of parent poms

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3512
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Ia3e021b5c9c07151b393a71bac1c975c87c39b22

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-review-verification-maven-istanbul/27/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-oran-review-verification-maven-istanbul/27/ )
